description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer featuring a thick, rectangular metal head with a slightly textured, dark gray finish. The head appears solid and heavy, with flat striking faces on both ends and a central section that is slightly rougher, possibly for added grip or aesthetic detail. The handle is long, straight, and made of wood, transitioning from a natural wood grain near the head to a darker, possibly rubberized grip at the end. The handle shows some subtle texturing and color variation, suggesting a comfortable and secure grip for heavy-duty use. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the hammer. The overall appearance is that of a durable tool suitable for demolition or construction tasks in urban environments.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a solid metal head and a long, straight wooden handle featuring a dark, textured grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the rectangular metal head.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the flat striking face of the metal head and the circular end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's color transition and the other side of the metal head.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle and the back face of the hammer head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a dark, textured rubberized grip at the end for enhanced hold.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of solid steel with flat striking faces on both ends.
